key_drivers: Rising real yields (DFII10 at 1.96%, up from ~1.5%) are the dominant bearish force for equities and gold
Widening HY credit spreads (2.94%) and slowing GDP growth (GDPNow 1.3% Q1) signal risk-off for US equities and small caps
RBA hawkish hike (+25bps to 4.10%) and China PMI recovery (50.4 in March) create strong bullish case for AUD (6A)
